zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Mortimer於1256年3月11日出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore26歲，母親Maud de Braose32歲。她於1279年與Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年在英國素福爾可易普斯維其享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Mortimer was born on 11 March 1256, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, was 26 and her mother, Maud de Braose, was 32. She married Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford in 1279, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1297, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Mortimer est née le 11 mars 1256, à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud de Braose, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford en 1279, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1297, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Mortimer am 11. März 1256 in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore 26 und ihre Mutter Maud de Braose 32. Sie hat 1279 in England, United Kingdom Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Ipswich, Suffolk, England und wurde in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford nel 1279, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1297, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Ipswich, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Mortimerが1256年3月11日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmoreは26歳，母Maud de Braoseは32歳であった。1279年にイギリスイギリスでRobert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイプスウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Mortimer(이)가 1256년 3월 11일 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud de Braose(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1279년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 이프스위치에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford em 1279, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Mortimer родилась 11 марта 1256 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger de Mortimer II, First Baron of Wigmore было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Braose, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford в 1279 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1297 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert de Vere 6th Earl of Oxford en 1279, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1297, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
